title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Mahindra Finance

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Mahindra Finance
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Mahindra Finance in Bhopal is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Mahindra Finance:
Mahindra Finance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Finance!
